reason: The market is experiencing significant conflicting signals. While regulatory headlines regarding stablecoin deposit insurance (FDIC) present a major headwind and extreme bearish sentiment ($10,000 BTC call) persists, strong institutional adoption (Revolut's banking license) and direct entry (Wells Fargo's WFUSD trademark) signal robust underlying demand and long-term validation. This dynamic creates a volatile environment, suggesting smart money is likely accumulating positions amidst uncertainty and fear, warranting a cautious 'WATCH' approach until clearer trends emerge.
headlines: Bloomberg strategist doubles down on $10,000 bitcoin call but peers say it would take a nuclear war to get there
Crypto-friendly fintech Revolut gains full UK banking license
Stablecoins won't get any kind of deposit insurance under GENIUS rules, says FDIC chief
Crypto Long & Short: AI agents choosing denationalized money
Wells Fargo signals deeper push into crypto, filing trademark for WFUSD
